description: EMA decay=0.95 (hurts at 200 steps - averaging drags model back)
warmdown=30 + grad_clip=0.3 (was 1200 warmdown crippling LR to 17%)
+ SwiGLU MLP (MLP_MULT=1) - faster & better than relu²
+ 10 layers (extra capacity pays off at 1700+ steps)
Gated Attention (no benefit even with better init)
LN Scale only (even constant mult adds overhead in compiled graph)
ortho init + ReLU adapter (too uniform + dead neurons)
ortho init + linear adapter (still worse than Gaussian)
